case_title: MINEKO SHIMADA VS. UCSF MEDICAL CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHIMADA, MINEKO AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF MEDICAL CENTER UCSF CENTER FOR REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIMADA, MINEKO AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF MEDICAL CENTER UCSF CENTER FOR REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-30-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF MEDICAL CENTER UCSF CENTER FOR REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UCSF MEDICAL CENTER UCSF CENTER FOR REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIMADA, MINEKO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UCSF MEDICAL CENTER UCSF CENTER FOR REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS NOT SUPPORTED BY EXPERT TESTIMONY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SHIMADA, MINEKO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, EXHIBIT PICKED UP BY HUSBAND THOMAS HART WITH PICK UP AUTHORIZATION LETTER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
